DataSourceDefinition.description: Data source (REST, gRPC, database). Operations are defined inside; each has an id (operationId) referenced by layout nodes.

connection.description: Type-specific: baseUrl for rest, address for grpc, provider/connectionString for database.

operation.description: Operations defined inside this data source; each has an id (operationId) used by layout nodes.

config.description: Type-specific config (headerName, token, username/password, tokenEndpoint, etc.).

DataSourceOperationDefinition.description: Operation defined inside a data source; shape depends on operation type (read has responseMapping with optionLabelPath/optionValuePath).

DataSourceOperationRestRead.description: REST read (GET list or autocomplete); defines responseMapping for label/value.

id.description: Operation id (operationId) referenced by layout nodes.

responseMapping.description: For operations that return items (list/autocomplete); optionLabelPath/optionValuePath depend on operation kind.

optionLabelPath.description: JSON path in response item for display (e.g. name).

optionValuePath.description: JSON path in response item for value to store (e.g. id).

itemsPath.description: JSON path to array in response, e.g. data.items.

DataSourceOperationDatabase.description: Database read; optional responseMapping when returning rows for list/autocomplete.
